title: AstralPVP
description: The Best PVP modpack! Includes everything you need for Mace, SMP, and Crystal, all in a vanilla feel!
body:
#  The Ultimate Competitive PvP Modpack 

Welcome to the definitive PvP experience designed for modern Minecraft combat. Whether you are standard pot-pvping, anchoring, macing, or crystal fighting, this pack is engineered from the ground up to give you **maximum frames**, **zero input lag**, and the **ultimate tactical advantage**. 

DISCLAIMER - This pack will not be updated to later version yet. Most of the PVP community uses 1.21.11 . Future version are planned for those who want it
---
## [CLAIM YOUR OG DISCORD RANK HERE (FIRST 50 JOINERS)](https://discord.gg/EFF67B34Bg)
## [Normal Discord](https://discord.gg/frpecx8dR9)

##  Key Features

* **Ultimate Combat Optimization:** Fully integrated optimizers for Crystals, Anchors, Pots, Pearls, Wind Charges, Maces, Bows, and Carts. Your actions register exactly when you mean them to.
* **Maximized Frames Per Second:** Powered by the holy trinity of optimization—**Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **ModernFix**—alongside cutting-edge chunk and rendering engines like **CCME**, **Voxy**, **VMP**, and **ImmediatelyFast**.
* **Flawless Input & Fluidity:** Zero latency thanks to **Kemmlow's Input Optimizer** and knockback refinements, giving you the snappiest response times possible in a 1.21+ combat landscape.
* **Tactical HUD & Visuals:** Track your status instantly with custom **Armor HUDs**, **TotemCounters**, **Shield Status**, and beautiful, non-intrusive **Enchantment Glint Outlines**.

---

##  What's Inside?

I’ve curated and fine-tuned over 60 of the best performance and utility mods on Fabric

###  Performance & Core Engines
The backbone of your FPS.
* **Sodium, Lithium, & FerriteCore** – Industry-standard rendering and memory optimization.
* **ModernFix & ServerCore** – Drastically reduces load times, memory leaks, and background stutter.
* **Voxy & CCME** – High-speed, multithreaded chunk management and extended rendering.
* **EntityCulling & More Culling** – If you can't see it, your PC isn't wasting power rendering it.
* **BadOptimizations & ImmediatelyFast** – Smooths out UI, text, and immediate-mode entity rendering.

###  Combat & Optimizer Suite
This pack features specialized micro-optimizers to streamline client-side action inputs.
* **Crystal & Anchor Optimizers:** Marlow's Crystal Optimizer, Client Side Crystals, Anchor Optimizer, and HerosAnchorOptimizer.
* **Weapon & Utility Optimizers:** Mace Optimizer, Crossbow & Bow Optimizer, Pot Optimizer, Pearl Optimizer, WindCharge Optimizer, Consumable Optimizer, and oneaura's Cart Optimizer.
* **Physics & Feedback:** BetterHurtCam (customizable damage tilt), Shield Fixes, and Knockback Optimizer.

###  HUD, UI, & Information
Information is power. Know your status, your enemy's status, and your gear's durability at a single glance.
* **uku's Armor HUD & Shield Status:** Keep track of your armor durability and offhand condition without opening your inventory.
* **TotemCounter:** Know exactly how many pops you and your opponents have left.
* **AppleSkin:** Accurate saturation and hunger visualization for perfect golden apple timing.
* **BetterF3 & Key Overlay:** Clean, customizable debug info and on-screen keystrokes.
* **Shulker Box Tooltip:** Preview container contents instantly.

###  Visuals & Audio Immersion
Look good, play better. Full support for modern visual enhancements without tanking your performance.
* **Iris:** Shaders support out of the box (optimized for performance).
* **Continuity & Entity Model/Texture Features:** Full connected textures and custom entity model support.
* **Sound Physics Remastered:** Realistic, immersive audio cues to help you pinpoint exactly where your opponent is running or healing.
* **Zoomify:** The ultimate customizable zoom mod to scout out enemies from afar.

---

##  Essential Controls & Customization

The pack comes pre-configured for a competitive setup, but you can tweak everything to your liking:
* Press **`M`** or **`Esc -> Mod Menu`** to configure individual mod settings.
* Press **`Z`** to Zoom.
* Press **`V`** to activate **Simple Voice Chat** (perfect for team callouts on compatible servers).

---
